nodes.label: AI as idea generation partner for customer empathy
nodes.grounding_span: AI has been very helpful with generating ideas about what would matter to this woman

nodes.label: AI as mockup generation tool with creative surprise
nodes.label_negative: Rigid, predictable mockup creation without AI
nodes.grounding_span: I am often very happily surprised with some of the visual representations the AI comes up with

nodes.label: AI as cost and time saving substitute for human freelancers
nodes.grounding_span: Being able to create images that look nearly as incredible, and have so much control over every aspect, feels like a relief every time

nodes.label: AI as threat to other creatives' livelihoods
nodes.label_negative: AI as harmless tool without negative externalities
nodes.grounding_span: I fully understand that my gain is another creative's loss

nodes.label: AI as future full-service design integrator
nodes.label_negative: Manual, piecemeal design workflow without AI
nodes.grounding_span: I really look forward to being able to upload my product image and having AI fully create mockups

nodes.label: Creative control and intentional direction
nodes.grounding_span: Ultimately I always feel like we're driving the actual creative decision making

nodes.label: Efficiency and cost reduction
nodes.grounding_span: a huge time and money saver

nodes.label: Ethical responsibility toward displaced workers
nodes.grounding_span: I recognize that it has harmed her financially

nodes.label: Enthusiasm for AI's creative expansion

nodes.label: Relief at AI's efficiency gains

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement with loose initial parameters
nodes.grounding_span: start without very strict parameters because I want to see what varying ideas it will come up with

nodes.label: Empathy-driven persona-based ideation
